The '''WR-542 Shooting Star''' light liaison frigate was a 35-[[Meter/Legends|meter]] courier built by [[Sienar Fleet Systems/Legends|Sienar Fleet Systems]] before the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]].

The WR-542 was a notably fast [[Starship/Legends|ship]] in any context, with a Class 0.5 [[Hyperdrive/Legends|hyperdrive]], but it was particularly notable for its superb performance in [[Planet/Legends|planetary]] [[Atmosphere/Legends|atmospheres]]. With its streamlined hull, it was capable of air speeds of up to 1,200 kph, and it was named the "Shooting Star" because of the spectacular, [[Meteor/Legends|meteor]]-like trail it left across the sky during re-entry maneuvers.

Ships of this class had a crew of one, plus a [[Sentience/Legends|sentient]] [[Droid brain/Legends|droid brain]] with a vocaliser. There was space for three passengers and a cargo capacity of 100 metric tons or 50 cubic meters. Stock ships were armed with two turret-mounted [[Laser cannon/Legends|laser cannons]].

By the time of the [[Battle of Endor/Legends|Battle of Endor]], the WR-542 had been superseded in [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] service by newer ships, but ships of this class remained popular with the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]], who used them as couriers and [[Scout/Legends|scouts]]—and, quite simply, with anyone who needed a fast ship.
